config_template.notes: Accepts either an int chunk size (e.g. PREFILL_CHUNK_SIZE) or a list of section sizes (e.g. tokens_per_image). Returns a Python list of ttnn.Tensor chunks. Seq-dim splits in transformer prefill use dim=2 (1,1,S,H layout); batch/token splits use dim=0.

applicability_notes: torch_pattern_source: call_site (ttnn.split mirrors torch.split signature: ttnn.split(image_features, tokens_per_image, dim=0); ttnn.split(hidden_states, PREFILL_CHUNK_SIZE, dim=2)); fusion_notes: Used as a chunking primitive for streaming long-sequence prefill: split -> per-chunk compute (sparse_matmul / MoE forward / lm_head) -> stream-accumulate/concat. Inputs are commonly deallocated immediately after split (deallocate(True)) to reduce peak DRAM. Common companion pattern: parallel splits of hidden_states (dim=2) and routing_weights/indices (dim=0) with identical chunk counts, zipped in a loop.

placement_observations.source: call_site: 'if seq_len > PREFILL_CHUNK_SIZE: hidden_chunks = ttnn.split(hidden_states, PREFILL_CHUNK_SIZE, dim=2) ... else: hidden_chunks = [hidden_states]' — split only invoked above chunk-size threshold; chunks stream-processed to reduce peak DRAM usage

call_site: 'if seq_len > split_size: down_input_list = ttnn.split(down_input, split_size, dim=2); down_input.deallocate(True)' — input deallocated immediately after split, outputs consumed by ttnn.sparse_matmul per-split

call_site: 'if hidden_states.shape[seq_dim] > chunk_size: hidden_states_chunks = ttnn.split(hidden_states, chunk_size, dim=seq_dim); ... routing_weights_chunks = ttnn.split(routing_weights, chunk_size, dim=0)' — comment: 'Process each chunk and stream-concatenate to reduce peak DRAM usage'

call_site: 'attn_output_11SH_chunks = ttnn.split(attn_output_11SH, seq_len // 4 // 2, dim=2); attn_output_11SH.deallocate(True)' — chunks fed to ring_all_gather with memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG

call_site: 'for image_tokens in ttnn.split(image_features, tokens_per_image, dim=0): image_tokens = ttnn.to_layout(image_tokens, ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT); image_grid = ttnn.view(...)' — split output converted to ROW_MAJOR for view/permute/unsqueeze chain
